thesis_clarity.label: Thesis Clarity
thesis_clarity.description: How specific, testable, and structural the world thesis is. 0 = no thesis. 100 = falsifiable structural claim.

invariant_count.label: Invariant Count
invariant_count.description: Number of declared structural invariants. Too few = governance vacuum. Too many = over-constrained.

invariant_quality.label: Invariant Quality
invariant_quality.description: Are invariants structural truths or aspirational statements? 0 = all aspirational. 100 = all structural.

rule_specificity.label: Rule Specificity
rule_specificity.description: How precisely rules define triggers and effects. 0 = impossibly vague. 100 = extremely brittle. Sweet spot is 40-70.

enforcement_depth.label: Enforcement Depth
enforcement_depth.description: How deeply enforcement logic covers the constitution

testing_coverage.label: Testing Coverage
testing_coverage.description: Percentage of rules and edge cases tested before deployment

role_separation.label: Role Separation
role_separation.description: How well-defined and non-overlapping role authorities are. 0 = all roles can do everything. 100 = perfect separation.

builder_experience.label: Builder Experience
builder_experience.description: Experience level of the person building the world

base_integrity.label: Base Integrity Score
base_integrity.description: Starting integrity before governance effects are applied

Production-Grade World.description: Well-authored world with strong thesis, comprehensive invariants, tested rules, and full enforcement

Template Clone.description: Copied from a template with minimal customization. Inherited invariants, generic rules.

Weekend Prototype.description: Quick build to test an idea. Some invariants, basic rules, no enforcement or testing.

Enterprise Deployment.description: High-stakes world for business use. Maximum rigor across all dimensions.

Governance Vacuum.description: No thesis, no invariants, no enforcement. Maximum fragility.
